summary: Frontend testing completed for Auctions page split and new Features page. All features working correctly: Features banner on Auctions page, Features page with gamification/extras/rewards sections, navigation between pages, feature card links, colored icons with NEU badges, and mobile responsive layout.

AuctionsPage_FeaturesBanner.details: Features banner '✨ Entdecke alle Features & Extras →' displayed at top of page with purple-pink gradient. Banner is clickable and navigates to /features page.

FeaturesPage_Layout.details: Page loads with data-testid='features-page'. Shows title 'Features & Extras', subtitle 'Entdecke alle BidBlitz Vorteile', and 'Zu den Auktionen →' button. Three sections: Gamification (6 cards), Extras (6 cards), Belohnungen (3 cards).

FeaturesPage_ColoredIcons.details: All feature cards have colored icons: Duelle (orange), Social Betting (yellow), Team-Bieten (green), Freunde-Battles (red), KI-Berater (blue), Gutschein-Auktionen (purple), Geschenkkarten (pink), Gebot-Alarm (red), Deal Radar (cyan), Preis-Alerts (green).

FeaturesPage_NEUBadges.details: Found 8 NEU badges on feature cards: Duelle, Social Betting, Team-Bieten, Freunde-Battles, KI-Berater, Gutschein-Auktionen, Geschenkkarten, Gebot-Alarm.

Navigation_FeaturesBannerToFeatures.details: Clicking 'Entdecke alle Features & Extras' banner on /auktionen navigates to /features page successfully.

Navigation_BackToAuctions.details: Clicking 'Zu den Auktionen →' button on /features navigates back to /auktionen page successfully.

FeatureLinks_Duels.details: Duelle card click navigates to /login (protected route redirect working correctly).

FeatureLinks_Betting.details: Social Betting card click navigates to /login (protected route redirect working correctly).

FeatureLinks_Teams.details: Team-Bieten card click navigates to /login (protected route redirect working correctly).

FeatureLinks_KIBerater.details: KI-Berater card click navigates to /ki-berater (public page).

FeatureLinks_Gutscheine.details: Gutschein-Auktionen card click navigates to /gutscheine (public page).

FeatureLinks_GiftCards.details: Geschenkkarten card click navigates to /login (protected route redirect working correctly).

FeatureLinks_Alarm.details: Gebot-Alarm card click navigates to /login (protected route redirect working correctly).

MobileResponsive_Auctions.details: Auctions page displays correctly on mobile. Features banner visible and prominent at top. Auction cards display in responsive grid.

MobileResponsive_Features.details: Features page displays correctly on mobile. 2-column grid layout for feature cards. NEU badges and colored icons visible. 'Zu den Auktionen' button accessible.

Translations_German.details: German translations verified: 'Features & Extras' title, 'Gamification' section, 'Extras' section, 'Belohnungen' section. Feature descriptions in German (e.g., '1v1 gegen andere Bieter', 'Wette auf Auktionsgewinner').

critical_code_review_comments: FeaturesPage.js properly uses colorClasses object with static Tailwind classes for icon colors
All feature cards have cursor-pointer and hover effects for good UX
Protected routes correctly redirect to /login when not authenticated
Auctions.js properly includes Link to /features with gradient styling
App.js has routes for both /features and /extras pointing to FeaturesPage

mocked_apis_list: VoucherAuctionsPage - uses demo voucher data when no real vouchers exist

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auctions page split completed successfully. /auktionen shows auctions with 'Entdecke alle Features & Extras' banner at top. /features shows all gamification, extras, and rewards features with colored icons and NEU badges. Navigation between pages works. All feature card links work (protected routes redirect to login). Mobile responsive layout verified at 390x844 viewport.
